title: atuna latifrons
intro: Atuna latifrons, also known as the Borneo ironwood or Kapur tree, is a species of tree native to the island of Borneo. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Atuna latifrons include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable resource in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Atuna latifrons typically involve the bark or wood being boiled or decocted to create a medicinal tea or infusion.
